steps.t: Orc sentries and corpses can be found in Rath Dúath. You should defeat Orc sentries and examine any Orc corpses that you find.
Another Orc corpse can be found closer to Echad Uial in Rath Dúath. You should seek out another Orc corpse to examine.
Footprints can be found leading away from the Orc corpse. You should follow the footprints.
Thurindol can be found at Echad Uial in Rath Dúath. You should talk to Thurindol.
